articles.title: Updated App Review Guidelines now available
articles.excerpt: The App Review Guidelines have been revised to clarify that apps with random or anonymous chat are subject to the 1.2 User-Generated Content guideline.Translations of the guidelines will be available on Apple Developer website within one month.

articles.title: Replay
articles.excerpt: Fast, reliable API tests without mocks or stale JSON fixtures. Replay records real HTTP traffic once (as HAR) and replays it instantly with Swift Testing so your networking code stays honest and your test suite stays fast.
